---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the tool
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: giopas
---

## Is your request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem or friction point is.
Example: "It's frustrating when I have to manually rename every cue after cloning..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear description of the feature or behaviour you'd like to see.

## Which tab / workflow does this affect?

- [ ] Setlist Manager
- [ ] Dictionary Manager
- [ ] Setup Checklist
- [ ] Trigger Manager
- [ ] General / Shell (theme, file loading, status bar, etc.)
- [ ] Other / New tab idea

## Alternatives you've considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've already tried or thought about.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, mockups, or any other context that might help explain the request.
